nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: FAST: Primary trigger - receives news alerts from Module 3. Low latency critical.

nodes.name: Get Sentiment Data
nodes.notes: FAST: Parallel enrichment - sentiment data for context

nodes.name: Get Calendar Today
nodes.notes: FAST: Parallel enrichment - today's macro calendar

nodes.name: Read COT Data
nodes.notes: FAST: Parallel enrichment - COT positioning data from cache

nodes.name: Build Critical Analysis Prompt
nodes.notes: FAST: Combines all enrichment data into structured prompt for LLM

nodes.name: LLM Critical Analysis
nodes.notes: FAST: LLM call optimized for speed - max_tokens 600, 55s timeout. Extracts critical analysis.

nodes.name: Format Alert
nodes.notes: FAST: Formats LLM response with urgency indicator and timestamp

nodes.name: Telegram Notification
nodes.notes: FAST: Immediate Telegram notification for mobile push

nodes.name: Save to Alerts Cache
nodes.notes: FAST: Appends alert to today's alerts cache file

nodes.name: Return Alerts Today
nodes.notes: FAST: Returns today's alert history via webhook
